_changelog_2026-04-29: Triaged 50 net-new roles from outputs/linkedin/linkedin_alerts_2026-04-29.md (after 19 dedup hits). 13 archived at pre-filter (titles/duplicates/stale-employer-already-applied). 37 JDs fetched. 3 closed/stale (Haystack, Roku, TE Connectivity). 2 dropped on comp-floor item 4 (Capital One Mgr Payment Data, JPMC Observability hackajob). New additions in list_a (16) and list_b (17) below.
notes: Active pre-application pipeline. Screening logic in screening_criteria.md. Score 1-5. Statuses: on-deck, screened, archive-review, applied. Sort: status (on-deck → screened → archive-review), then score desc.
list_a_definition: Realistic Baby Step: Manager / Sr Manager / Principal at any size; Director / Head at S (<500).
list_b_definition: Realistic Stretched: Director / Head at M/L; Sr Director / VP / MD at any size.

list_a.title: Senior Product Manager, Payments
list_a.notes: Direct payments-infra fit (vaulting, ledger, routing, tokenization) bridges cleanly to Infotech terminal/settlement work and NG platform-ownership pattern. Friction: payments PM title required; salary not listed (verify at apply).

list_a.title: Senior Technical Product Manager
list_a.notes: Utility regulated-infra pillar match maps directly to NG AMI platform leadership; cloud-data-platform language fits. Friction: comp $160-200K straddles floor; small company (450), Sr PM altitude is lateral not stretch.

list_a.title: Director of Product Management, Personalized Experiences
list_a.notes: Director PM at unknown M-size client; personalization/AI-ML focus has only thin bridge to Maz's AI-augmented PowerShell+Jira automation. Friction: 5-7 yrs AI/ML consumer e-commerce PM specifically required; aggregator hidden employer.

list_a.title: Director of Product Management, Growth
list_a.notes: Generic Enterprise SaaS Director PM at hidden client; 4+ yrs managing PMs is direct-mgmt friction (last people-mgmt 2015). Comp $177-284K, in band; experimentation language acceptable bridge.

list_a.title: Sr Manager, Program Management, Relay Trust
list_a.notes: Re-screened post-rule-fix. Sr Mgr at big-tech qualifies on altitude (item 3); comp $151.4-204.8K straddles $180K floor. Friction: domain is transportation fraud/misuse/abuse with 60+ Risk Analysts direct reports — fraud-adjacent and direct-mgmt heavy (last 2015), no payments/regulated-infra pillar match.

list_a.title: Sr. Product Manager - Tech, Devices and Services FinTech
list_a.notes: JD literally says 'gathering requirements' for internal financial reporting tools (red-flag verb item 11) and is FP&A-systems flavored, hitting domain knock-out item 5. FAANG-pedigree gate also looms.

list_a.title: Senior Product Manager (Tech), Customer Experience and Business Trends
list_a.notes: Research/study-design AWS evaluation function — closer to product research than core PM execution; FAANG-internal pedigree gate is a real Boolean filter (item 12). Pillar match thin.

list_a.title: IT Product Owner - Global Business Application & Platform Services
list_a.notes: Product Owner for ERP replatform sounds Q2C/billing-systems-adjacent (item 5) and JD is explicitly user-story authoring + UAT execution, not product strategy. Also Seattle on-site.

list_a.title: Sr. Product Manager (Shingles)
list_a.notes: Physical-product (CPG roofing) category PM with 30% travel; not a software/B2B SaaS or regulated-infra pillar match. Malvern PA in radius but Western suburb (soft friction).

list_a.title: Senior Product Manager
list_a.notes: Healthcare B2B2C wellness, only 4+ yrs PM required which is below altitude; comp $165-190K straddles floor. No fintech/payments/regulated-infra pillar match.

list_a.title: Head of Product Management
list_a.notes: AI agentic-GTM B2B SaaS startup with category-defining-product expectation; SF location implied. Pillar match thin (no payments/regulated-infra) and 200+ applicants at executive title.

list_a.title: Senior Product Manager (consumer food/ops)
list_a.notes: Salary $140-156K is entire range below $180K floor (item 4 hard knock-out). Consumer food/operations not a pillar match either.

list_a.title: Senior Manager, Product Management, Client Trust
list_a.notes: JD is explicitly Account Security and fraud-mitigation product strategy — security domain knock-out (item 5). SF onsite. Hard cap at 1.

list_a.title: Lead Product Manager, Payments Network
list_a.notes: Lead PM (Principal-equivalent) for cross-border payments network bridging crypto and traditional finance — bullseye payments-pillar match to Maz's central-bank co-architecture + Infotech terminal/settlement work. Comp $192-216K NY in band. Friction: '10+ yrs payment services / enterprise software / virtual assets' and 'keen curiosity about blockchain' (Ripple ecosystem) plus 10+ days/month NY/Toronto in-office.

list_a.title: Head of Product
list_a.notes: Head of Product reporting to Andrew Ng at DeepLearning.AI; comp $200-230K MV CA. Bridge: Widener Innovation Toolbox course design + AI-augmented automation. Friction: 'shipping consumer (B2C) digital products with measurable impact' is a B2C pedigree gate (Maz is mostly B2B/B2B2C); 2+ yrs PM-of-PMs requirement (last people-mgmt 2015 — soft).

list_a.title: Senior Product Manager, Communications Platform
list_a.notes: Mission-driven EM credit-fintech (11 markets); comp $224-240K. 'Build the unified customer profile for messaging — resolving fragmented identifiers across systems' has bridge to Maz's NG alerts/notifications + Infotech multi-bank consolidation pattern. Friction: SF location (in-list but no remote stated) and 7+ yrs platform/infra PM.

list_a.title: Senior Product Manager
list_a.notes: Comp $130-180K (top exactly at floor). Domain is PM-tools-for-PMs (Aha! roadmaps) — no payments/fintech/regulated-infra pillar match. 'Skill in building robust prototypes with AI' is gateable but bridge is partial.

list_a.title: Senior Product Manager
list_a.notes: Digital Employee Experience (DEX) platform: real-time monitoring/automation/remediation for IT ops and endpoint mgmt. Salary not disclosed. Pillar match thin (no payments/fintech/regulated); 'extensive experience with IT operations solutions' specialty gate.

list_a.title: Senior Product Manager
list_a.notes: Voice/call-protection AI (28B calls/month) = security-domain-adjacent (item 5 grey: voice-fraud/spam-blocking). Comp $181-218K just above floor. Seattle no remote indicated. Live working assignment in interview loop.

list_a.title: Cloud Platform Product Delivery Manager
list_a.notes: Comp $118.7-197K straddles floor; Jersey City NJ in-list. Title 'Product Delivery Manager' = below Sr PM altitude in spirit (delivery/release-mgmt focus per JD: 'intake, dependency management, release management'). 5+ yrs.

list_a.title: Product Manager, Platform Benchmarking
list_a.notes: Listed under Marketing category, '2+ yrs SW dev or PM' — below Sr PM altitude floor. Comp $148-224K straddles. No domain pillar match (GPU benchmarking).

list_a.title: Product Manager, Safety Systems
list_a.notes: AI-safety / trust & safety / red-teaming PM, comp $293-385K. SF onsite assumed. Friction: '6+ yrs PM with specific expertise in AI safety, trust & safety, integrity, or related domains' is a pedigree gate (item 13 no defensible bridge from payments/utility-infra).

list_a.title: Senior Product Manager, Platform
list_a.notes: Coda database/calculation platform team; comp $206-258K SF/Seattle. Productivity-doc category, no payments/fintech/regulated-infra pillar match. '5+ yrs PM ideally including database/calculation/performance work' specialty gate.

list_a.title: Senior Product Manager
list_a.notes: Hidden-employer aggregator. B2B SaaS data platform for procurement/sourcing/supplier-data/supply-chain. Salary not specified, 200+ applicants. No fintech/regulated-infra pillar; 5+ yrs B2B SaaS customer-facing-product specialty gate.

list_a.title: Product Manager / Head of Product
list_a.notes: Recruiter aggregator placing PMs at early-stage AI startups; comp €60-180K (bottom band well below US floor; top straddles). 'Define a product, not manage one' framing targets founder-tier; SF/Warsaw/London/Berlin/remote. Hidden employer.

list_a.title: Product Manager, Trust & Safety
list_a.notes: JD is explicitly Trust & Safety / fraud / member-support automation — security/fraud domain (item 5 grey) AND SF in-office Mon-Thu = location knock-out (item 7). Hard cap at 1.

list_a.title: Lead Product Manager, Token
list_a.notes: Tokenomics / Arc-blockchain native-token design; '5+ yrs in crypto research, token design, protocol economics, or governance operations' — crypto-specialist Boolean knock-out (item 12-adjacent, no defensible bridge from Maz's payments-issuance work to tokenomics design).

list_b.title: Director of Technical Product Ownership
list_b.notes: Bill-payment platform Director leading TPO teams aligns tightly with Maz's payments-domain past + NG platform-ownership present; ACH/card-networks fit. Friction: 'Technical Product Ownership' title hints at TPO over PM strategy; verify at apply.

list_b.title: Sr. Director, Product Management, DevX - Operational Intelligence & Observability
list_b.notes: Pillar bullseye: operational intelligence + observability platform = Maz's NG AMI defect-tracking/visibility playbook + Comcast crisis-response analytics. Friction: SF (in-list) + 9+ yrs PM track record at LMAdjacent altitude.

list_b.title: Senior Director, Product Management, Card Technology
list_b.notes: Sr Director Card Technology at Capital One leading ~14 direct/indirect reports on 'critical operations and strategic transformation initiatives' — bullseye payments/card-tech pillar match to Maz's Infotech card-network co-architecture + national PCI-DSS work. Comp $294-336K NYC. Friction: 9+ yrs PM, 14 reports is heavy people-mgmt (last 2015), quantitative degree gate, no sponsorship.

list_b.title: Principal Product Manager
list_b.notes: Fintech compliance + regulator-engagement framing fits Maz's central-bank co-architecture role; KYB/KYC/AML platform. Friction: 10+ yrs delivering compliance/onboarding/risk platforms specifically required, may screen on prior regtech title.

list_b.title: Head of Enterprise PMO
list_b.notes: Re-screened post-rule-fix. Head altitude clean, NYC in-list, comp $180-210K at floor; insurance/reinsurance regulated-industry pillar match plus 'build and embed enterprise PMO functions' language is exactly Maz's Infotech PMO creation + NG defect-tracking playbook. Friction: 10+ yrs enterprise PMO leadership specifically and Monday.com adoption ownership.

list_b.title: Director of Product Management
list_b.notes: Blockchain cross-border payments network; FX, treasury, digital asset infra. Comp $200-250K. '7+ yrs PM in payments, treasury, or financial infrastructure' is a clean pillar match to Infotech VP work. Friction: hidden-employer aggregator, US citizen/GC required (no friction for Maz), Sunnyvale CA.

list_b.title: Director Product, B2B
list_b.notes: Director Product B2B for Home Care agency strategy at senior-living marketplace; comp $180-215K + 30% bonus, US remote (Marlton NJ in header). 10+ yrs PM with 3+ yrs senior leader. Bridge: B2B2C marketplace pillar fits Maz's Infotech VP merchant-platform work; 'mission-driven' nice-to-have. Friction: senior-living/eldercare has thin pillar bridge (no fintech/regulated-infra).

list_b.title: Vice President, Digital Products and Services
list_b.notes: VP at Philly nonprofit medical association, hybrid 2 days; technical CS/SE background fits Maz's BS Software Engineering. Friction: medical education/digital-publishing domain bridge weak; healthcare not a pillar.

list_b.title: Director, Program Management (Commercial)
list_b.notes: Re-screened post-rule-fix. Director altitude clean, NJ location, comp $155-206K straddles floor; portfolio governance + executive trade-off framing fits Maz's Infotech PMO creation. Friction: 'supporting Marketing' partnership leans toward marketing-PMO adjacency (item 2 grey zone) and 'Lead and develop Business Portfolio Managers' is direct-mgmt language (last 2015, soft).

list_b.title: Director, Program Management & Delivery
list_b.notes: Re-screened post-rule-fix. Director clean, Bridgewater NJ in-radius, comp $170-195K straddles floor + 30% bonus, PMP required (Maz holds). 'Establish and lead enterprise program management and delivery framework' + 'Translate complex delivery data into actionable insights' aligns with Maz's NG operational-intelligence pattern. Friction: no payments/fintech/regulated pillar; printer/imaging consumer-electronics company.

list_b.title: Director of Product Management, Clearing
list_b.notes: Director PM at institutional digital-asset platform launching US derivatives infra (FCM/DCM/DCO); comp $230-255K NY. Pillar match on regulated-financial-infra + central-bank-table parallel. Friction: '10+ yrs PM with specific focus on derivatives trading and market structure' + 'Deep understanding of CFTC regulations' is a regtech-trading specialty gate (item 12-adjacent).

list_b.title: Director, Product Management, MyPay
list_b.notes: Consumer fintech Director PM at Chime (MyPay product). Domain pillar match (payments, regulated, 0-to-1, cross-functional). Friction: 'Lead and develop a team of PMs' triggers Maz's recent-direct-PM-management gap (last 2015); 169 applicants = heavy competition; consumer-product user-engagement-retention specificity is a recruiter Boolean Maz can't directly carry; posting 2 weeks old (recency overridden by user request). Bridge framing: B2C PSP at Infotech (120K merchants, 150M+ transactions) + matrixed cross-functional leadership at NG. Comp $239-330K excellent. Location workable via fully remote program option (4-days-in-office SF not viable for Marlton NJ). Pursue only with warm path or referral; cold-apply odds low on this pile. Different posting from previously-archived Chime Group PM Platform role (4356628362) which went stale.

list_b.title: Director, Product Management
list_b.notes: Director PM at L-size SaaS in Philly (in-radius); generic SaaS scope, no domain knock-out. Friction: '5+ yrs managing PMs' is direct-mgmt friction (Maz's last 2015 — soft, not no-flex).

list_b.title: Director Global Program Management Office
list_b.notes: Re-screened post-rule-fix. Director clean, Redmond WA in Seattle metro, comp $220-260K solid, 10+ yrs. Friction: JD red-flag verbs heavy ('Facilitate team management,' 'Coordinate effective reporting,' 'support team leaders') leaning coordinator/facilitator, and IT-services-integrator employer is consulting-PMO adjacent (item 11).

list_b.title: Vice President of Product
list_b.notes: Nonprofit-SaaS VP at S size (~50-150 ppl), remote-ET; comp $180-210K just at floor. 8+ yrs PM + 3+ yrs leading PMs achievable; mission-tech bridge usable like Nava.

list_b.title: Vice President, Product - Clarity Services
list_b.notes: Alternative-data/credit-risk fintech VP fits regulated-data pillar; comp $225-325K. Friction: VP altitude with credit-risk/fraud preferred (alt-data vs Maz's payments-rails experience needs bridge).

list_b.title: Staff Product Manager (Copilot Intelligence Platform)
list_b.notes: Developer-platform Staff PM with model-orchestration/routing/eval focus; remote US, comp $140-372K. Friction: AI/ML platform-PM pedigree gate is real (item 12 Bedrock/Vertex AI deep specialist adjacent).

list_b.title: Director, TPM, Delivery Operations, Global Network Delivery
list_b.notes: Director TPM Delivery Ops at Google network/data-center supply chain; comp $282-392K Sunnyvale. 'Owning the critical end-to-end schedule' for complex infra delivery aligns with Comcast cloud-network 12→6-mo + NG platform delivery. Friction: 15 yrs technical infra + supply-chain/sourcing/manufacturing/logistics pedigree (Maz's depth is delivery ops, not supply chain), big globally distributed people mgmt.

list_b.title: Sr. Director or VP of Product Management
list_b.notes: Sr Dir/VP PM at EHSQ SaaS, remote US/Canada, comp $133.6-248.5K straddles floor. 5+ yrs Sr PM/Director + 3+ yrs leading PM teams + full P&L; 'EHS, quality management, or human capital management sectors' preferred. Pillar match partial via regulated-industry ops at NG (utility safety/compliance). Friction: 200+ applicants; PM-of-PMs requirement.

list_b.title: Senior Director, Product Management
list_b.notes: Generic SrDir PM at hidden enterprise SaaS client, $230-270K, remote. Modern agile / empowered teams language is neutral; Maz can frame NG platform delivery against it. Friction: hidden employer + 200+ pile.

list_b.title: VP, AI Product Management & Delivery
list_b.notes: Insurance/annuities VP AI Product, Radnor PA (Western suburb soft friction). Regulated-financial-services pillar match; comp $157-285K. Friction: Bedrock/Vertex/LLMs preferred (item 12 adjacent) and 3-5 yrs senior AI/ML PM bar.

list_b.title: Director TPM, InfraGov
list_b.notes: Re-screened post-rule-fix. Director TPM at big-tech (Pinterest), US Remote, comp $193-397K excellent. 'Source-of-truth reporting, dashboards, and business reviews that make infrastructure cost visible' = Maz's NG defect-tracking + Comcast analytics-backbone playbook. Friction: 'annual planning, quarterly re-forecasting, variance management, execute-to-budget' is FinOps/finance-planning adjacent (item 5 FP&A grey zone) and 'AI-first execution mindset' GenAI gate.

list_b.title: Director of Product Management / Head of Product
list_b.notes: AI-reasoning systems for institutional asset owners; pillar match on regulated-infra/fintech-adjacent. Friction: must personally prototype with Lovable/Replit (item 11-adjacent execution bar) and AI-product track record required.

list_b.title: VP Product - Lending & Retention
list_b.notes: Fintech lending VP for emerging markets, $230-300K, remote; pillar match on payments/credit infra. Friction: 15+ yrs lending/retention product leadership specifically — Maz's payments-issuance bridge to lending is partial.

list_b.title: Director, Program Management Office
list_b.notes: Director PMO at AI/ML quant hedge fund (multibillion-dollar asset manager); comp $250-300K Berkeley CA. '10+ yrs program/portfolio/delivery leadership + 5+ yrs people management + 5+ yrs building/scaling a PMO' aligns with Maz's Infotech PMO creation playbook. Friction: 5+ yrs people mgmt direct (last 2015 — soft) and onsite Berkeley implied.

list_b.title: Senior Vice President of Product Management
list_b.notes: Nonprofit EdTech SVP at small org, remote, $200-234K, PMP highly desirable (Maz holds). Friction: education/nonprofit not a pillar; 'hired and grew product mgmt teams' direct-mgmt friction.

list_b.title: Open Bank Product Lead
list_b.notes: Open banking / open finance platform: 'secure, scalable exchange of customer data with approved third- and fourth-party partners.' Comp $153-260K SF/Minneapolis straddles. Pillar match (regulated banking, B2B2C platform, central-bank parallel). Friction: SF/Minneapolis hybrid onsite (location grey — SF in-list, Minneapolis not), 'Product Lead' altitude ambiguous, 7+ yrs business execution.

list_b.title: Director of Product - Yahoo Search (Sports & Entertainment)
list_b.notes: Search-vertical IC Director PM, US remote, $150-327K. Friction: 4+ yrs in search/content/high-scale consumer required AND deep sports/entertainment passion — neither is a pillar; bridge weak.

list_b.title: Director, Product Management (Typography)
list_b.notes: Director Adobe Fonts/Typography w/ generative-AI strategy ownership; comp $231-334.5K SJ. '10+ yrs PM including leadership of multiple Product Managers' is direct PM-mgmt requirement. Creative-tools domain has no pillar bridge to payments/regulated-infra; AI/ML partnering experience preferred.

list_b.title: Vice President of Product Management
list_b.notes: FAST/streaming media VP requires 15+ yrs streaming/FAST/media platform background — domain pedigree gate. Bay Area implied. Comp $275-315K is strong.

list_b.title: Head of Product, Alexa Connections
list_b.notes: Consumer messaging/communications product at 600M-device scale; FAANG-pedigree gate (item 12) and 0->1/1->N consumer software bar. Pillar match thin.

list_b.title: VP, Product Management (Seattle)
list_b.notes: Travel-marketplace VP, Seattle (in-list); 10+ yrs B2B platforms required + AI-driven products. No domain pillar match (travel not in payments/fintech/regulated/B2B-SaaS-at-scale priority list). Multi-VP+pile.

list_b.title: VP, Product Management (San Jose)
list_b.notes: Same role as Seattle posting; San Jose in-list. Same friction: 10+ yrs B2B platforms + AI-driven products required, no payments/fintech/regulated pillar match.

list_b.notes: Kids/teens consumer YouTube w/ COPPA/GDPR/AADC compliance; comp $240-334K San Bruno. Friction: 5 yrs people mgmt + 10 yrs PM + child-safety/policy pedigree + FAANG-internal pedigree gate (item 12). No payments/regulated-infra pillar bridge.

Friction: '12+ yrs PM' + 'Proven experience leading AI-powered or data-driven products from concept to scale' + 'AI agents / workflow automation' — agentic AI pedigree gate (Maz hard lock: not claiming agentic AI track record). 200+ applicants.

list_b.notes: Credit-card portfolio P&L role; comp $133-190K (top barely at $180K+); JPMC 'VP' is essentially Sr Mgr altitude. Wilmington DE in 60-mi radius. Pillar match thin without credit-card-issuer history.

list_b.title: Vice President, J.P. Morgan Reserve Card Product Strategy
list_b.notes: Comp $133-190K (top barely above floor), JPMC 'VP' is essentially Sr Mgr altitude. HNW credit-card strategy; 8+ yrs FS PM. Pillar match thin without HNW credit-card-issuer history.

list_b.title: Director, Global Product Leader
list_b.notes: 12+ yrs biotech/pharma + oncology drug development required — biotech/pharma PM history Boolean knock-out (item 12). Hard cap at 1-2.

list_b.title: Director of Product Management - CRM Technology
list_b.notes: Mortgage-CRM Director with 5+ yrs mortgage lending lifecycle required (domain pedigree) + Salesforce/HubSpot/CRM specialist (item 12-adjacent). Comp $195-215K. Hybrid in CA/TX, remote OK.

list_b.title: Director of Product Management (North America)
list_b.notes: Electronic interconnect distributor; Director PM = inventory/margin/supplier strategy management — not software product strategy (item 2 borderline). Philly in-radius.

list_b.title: Director Product Management

list_b.title: Director of Program Management (8242)
list_b.notes: Internal NG role; Director of Program Management, NY Gas Business; req 8242. Strong 4-pillar match (#2 regulated industry, #6 op intelligence + exec translation, #7 process/program transformation = bullseye on PMO creation, #8 XFN leadership). Comp Downstate $210-246K (above floor) / Upstate Syracuse $175-205K (straddles floor + relocation needed). Friction: Six Sigma cert gap (Lean experience documented but no LSS cert), internal-app politics (Mary Ann Burkhart visibility), location (Downstate only without relocation). PMP held = credential match. Apply only after (a) deciding Downstate-only, (b) briefing current manager, (c) identifying NY Gas HM, (d) tailoring resume for internal context with NG outcomes promoted.
